text.title: LlamaIndex — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `llamaindex`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: chunk
step.action: SentenceSplitter / TokenTextSplitter with size/overlap per r2.

step.name: query
step.action: QueryEngine.query OR Workflow.run; retrieve top_k → rerank → synthesise.

step.name: cite
step.action: Render node_id + source_path + char_range in answer.
